title: smṛti-bench Antigravity result
description: Schema for manually-collected Antigravity bench results. Copy this template, fill in responses, commit to bench/results/.

arm.description: 'baseline' = no smṛti MCP; 'smrti' = smṛti MCP connected via mcp_config.json

timestamp.description: UTC timestamp when session was run, format YYYYMMDDTHHMMSSz

fixture.description: Path or description of fixture used, e.g. 'bench/fixtures/.memory (standard)'

antigravity_version.description: Antigravity build/version string if visible in UI

gemini_model.description: Gemini model shown in Antigravity agent panel, e.g. 'gemini-3-pro'

notes.description: Optional: anything notable about the session (context window state, MCP errors, etc.)

prompt_text.description: The prompt as entered in Antigravity (copy from battery.txt)

response.description: Full response text from Antigravity agent. Paste verbatim.

tool_calls_observed.description: Optional: names of smṛti MCP tools Antigravity called, if visible in agent panel

elapsed_s.description: Optional: approximate wall-clock seconds for response

error.description: If agent errored or refused, describe here
